Author: ScytRaiin
Name: Callouts
Description: User-defined trigger rules that turn in-game events into local alerts - Echo messages, sound effects, and toasts. Rules are configured entirely in the UI; everything stays on your machine.
Punchline: When something you care about happens, Callouts tells you.
Changelog: Callouts 1.2.0 — Live events improvements: per-category log budgets, category filters, and search.
